tools.name: get_schema
tools.description: Returns the base ReoGridJsonDocument schema (envelope + cells, styles, borders, merges) and an index of advanced features. Call get_feature_spec(feature) for any feature in the index before populating it.

tools.name: get_feature_spec
tools.description: Returns the full schema fragment for one advanced feature listed in get_schema().features.

tools.name: publish_sheet
tools.description: Publishes a ReoGridJsonDocument and returns a public URL. Anonymous; rate-limited per IP. No expiry in Phase 1. The doc must conform to the schema returned by get_schema().

tools.name: get_sheet
tools.description: Fetches a previously published sheet by its short ID.
